settings.operatorNameDesc: Shown in the Agent Hub and on completed-task records. Default is
settings.githubCloneDesc: Parent folder where GitHub repos are cloned (set once). Cloned repos go into
settings.githubTokenPresent: A GitHub personal access token is currently saved on this device.
settings.githubTokenAbsent: No GitHub token saved. Connect GitHub from the onboarding screen.
settings.languageRtlNote: Arabic (AR) switches the interface to right-to-left layout.

onboarding.title: Activate this workspace with a roadmap

onboarding.githubCard: Choose a cloud project from GitHub.
onboarding.githubCardDesc: Browse repositories on GitHub and select a cloud-based project to work with or integrate into your workflow.
onboarding.addDocsDesc: Use existing files or let the app scaffold a starter set. The tracker is generated and the dashboard opens automatically after you import or create
onboarding.roadmapDetected: Roadmap detected — tracker not generated yet.
onboarding.noFolderHint: Pick a local folder or connect to GitHub above to enable these actions.
